mrpipeline 0.4.0

    Clump instruments using LD reference

    clump_instruments.Rd

    Computes pseudo p-values (to ensure correct ranking by PLINK) and performs LD clumping via ieugwasr::ld_clump().

    clump_instruments(
  dat,
  rsq_thresh,
  clump_kb = 10000,
  bfile = NULL,
  plink_bin = NULL,
  pop = "EUR"
)

    Arguments

    dat

    Data frame with columns rsid, pval, id, and optionally beta and se (used for pseudo p-value computation). If beta and se are absent, pval is used directly.

    rsq_thresh

    R-squared clumping threshold.

    clump_kb

    Clumping window in kb. Default 10000.

    bfile

    Path to PLINK bfile prefix. If NULL, uses API clumping.

    plink_bin

    Path to PLINK binary. If NULL, auto-detected.

    pop

    Population for API clumping. Default "EUR".

    Value

    Data frame of clumped variants (output of ieugwasr::ld_clump()).

    Details

    Pseudo p-values are generated by:

    1. Computing z-scores: beta / se

    2. Computing precise -log10(p) via Rmpfr::pnorm()

    3. Ranking SNPs by -log10(p) descending

    4. Assigning evenly spaced pseudo p-values from 1e-100 to 0.9

    Contents

    Developed by Benjamin Zuckerman, Alasdair Warwick.
